ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-23-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-13-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, NORMA $1,409.55 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $667.37 INTEREST, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,706.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
